testSummary: Full cold suite 36/36 turbo tasks, 0 cached. image 36 unit+integration; web vitest 9 (editor-emits-mjml + save-template real PG); LocalStack S3 image e2e 2 (presign->PUT->sharp variants->usage_counters under workspace prefix; isolation via key sanitization); Playwright browser e2e 2 (GrapesJS+MJML editor renders in real Chromium, emits MJML rooted at <mjml>, image -> <mj-image src>). typecheck + lint OK. No regression phases 2-10.
e2eSummary: Playwright (real Chromium) proves the GrapesJS+MJML editor mounts, composes, and EMITS MJML (not hand-rolled HTML); LocalStack S3 proves presigned PUT under ${workspace_id}/ + sharp variants + usage_counters bytes, all real (DB never mocked).
notes: Implement agent dropped on a transient socket error after writing all files; orchestrator completed + verified with fixes: (1) web vite.config vitest test.include test/** + exclude e2e/** (Playwright owns e2e); (2) playwright.config webServer switched to vite dev (5173) for reliable spawn in CI (build+preview chaining was flaky); (3) installed matching Chromium build 1223; (4) PRODUCTION FIX: S3 client requestChecksumCalculation:'WHEN_REQUIRED' in services/image/src/deps.ts (+test client) — SDK v3 default WHEN_SUPPORTED signs x-amz-checksum-crc32 into presigned PUT URLs that a browser/fetch PUT can't reproduce -> S3 rejects; (5) image e2e beforeAll now cleans S3 objects under workspace prefixes (S3 not transactional); (6) isolation test asserts our code's guarantee (workspace-from-context + filename sanitization neutralizes ../WS_B traversal -> key stays under A/) and documents that SigV4 signature-scope rejection is real-S3-enforced (LocalStack doesn't validate presigned sigs). Editor uses core GrapesJS (BSD-3) + grapesjs-mjml, NOT Studio SDK; compiled HTML produced server-side via @cdp/email compileMjml at save, stored with mjml in email_templates. Every S3 key under ${workspace_id}/; assertKeyInWorkspace guards the variant handler; buildImageBytesUpsert binds workspace_id $1 additive. Scope §11 only (Vite+Preact bootstrapped minimally; full SPA is Phase 12).
